description: Dashboard.version is declared as `integer format int64` but the actual Axiom API emits 64-bit hybrid-logical-clock timestamps that exceed JavaScript's Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (e.g. 1777031138824767043). In live responses the value even switches between JSON number and JSON string for the same field. Using `Schema.Number` silently truncates precision and the follow-up update returns 'dashboard version mismatch'. We model it as `oneOf` string|integer so the generator emits Schema.Unknown and the client forwards whatever the server sent.

value.description: 64-bit server-assigned version (hybrid-logical-clock timestamp). Emitted as either JSON number or JSON string, sometimes exceeding JavaScript Number precision.
Required for updates when overwrite is false. Pass back the version value received from the server verbatim (string or number).
